component.name: HiresTI
component.summary: High-res TIDAL client with bit-perfect playback

description.p: This is a community package of HiresTI, maintained independently and unaffiliated with HiresTI or TIDAL. A TIDAL subscription is required to stream.

HiresTI is a modern, high-fidelity TIDAL client for Linux built with GTK4 and libadwaita. It focuses on high-resolution, bit-perfect playback, with native USB DAC passthrough, a GStreamer audio pipeline and an optional DSP/equalizer stage.

Permissions: by default this package keeps a tight sandbox — network, display and audio (PipeWire/PulseAudio) — which is enough for normal playback. Bit-perfect, exclusive output to a USB DAC needs raw device access, which is not granted by default; enable it when you need it with "flatpak override":

ul.li: Bit-perfect USB DAC output: flatpak override --user --device=all com.hiresti.player
